name: Australia Post eParcel Shipping Manual Rates Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Both eParcel regular post and eParcel express post will need to be set up individually. Services, rates and shipping options must be separate to account for the two services. Naming conventions should be kept the same throughout the setup to avoid confusion. Additionally, if it is unknown if there is an existing eParcel service in place, add an asterisk in the name so the new service can be easily identified (eg. eParcel*)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Limitations"}], "data-id": "benefits-limitations"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping quotes are faster using a manual setup as it's not relying on the API to return shipping rates."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "No downtime for customers in receiving shipping quotes if the carrier is experiencing technical difficulties or downtime."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Rates and zones will not automatically update when the carrier makes updates. These will need to be updated manually in Neto."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Prepare eParcel Zone File"}], "data-id": "prepare-eparcel-zone-file"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eParcel zones are provided in PDF format from your eParcel account manager. As eParcel regularly update their zones it is important to convert and import the zones before you setup the rates to ensure the zones are accurate."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open your eParcel zones file and copy the entire contents including the destination, zones and postcodes into a spreadsheet (e.g. MS Excel/Google Sheets). Alternatively, convert the eParcel Zones from PDF to Excel using a converter (e.g. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://smallpdf.com/pdf-to-excel", "children": [{"text": "https://smallpdf.com/pdf-to-excel"}]}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://www.neto.com.au/assets/docs/shipping/shipping_zone_import.csv", "children": [{"text": "Download the Neto shipping zone template file"}]}, {"text": ", or create a new excel sheet with the following column names: "}, {"text": "Zone Name", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Zone code", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "From Post Code", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "To Post Code", "code": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Courier", "code": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Country", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Copy the data from the eParcel zone file into the correct fields in the CSV file. Use the following table to assist in placing the data into the correct fields."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Column Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Definition"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Data Formatting Required"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Name"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name for the zone eg. Sydney Metro, SA Country etc."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Name needs to display for every line item"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Code for the zone eg. Q1, T0, N3 etc"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Code needs to display for every line item"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From Post Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The first post code int he zone"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Where there are postcodes with only 3 numbers for example Northern Territory post codes place a \u20180\u2019 in front of the post code."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To Post Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The last post code in the zone"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Where there is a from post code but no to post code, this is where the range only covers that single post code.
